Enhance your bed with this luxury Box Pleated Skirt. Twin Size, 800 TC Egyptian Cotton, 10-Inch Drop, machine washable. Perfect for style and comfort. Available in Moss color.

  Beautiful Box Pleated Design for a Luxury Bedskirts. Twin Size Bed Skirt with 800 TC Egyptian Cotton for soft and comfortable feel. 10-Inch Drop gives plenty of space under your bed to store your essentials. Machine Washable to keep your bedding fresh and new-looking. Perfect for updating your bedroom decor.
  Immerse yourself in elegance with this Box Pleated Bed Skirt. 100% Egyptian Cotton provides soft and durable material. Twin Size with 10-Inch Drop fits perfectly under your mattress. This bedskirt is a stylish addition to your bed, helping you hide the bed legs and frame. Easy care with machine washable fabric. 10-Star Quality from a trusted brand.
